combined_text_for_llm: Daffodils "Daffodils A welcome sign that Spring is here, daffodils are surely one of the world's most popular flowers. Who could fail to be cheered up by their gorgeous colours and nodding heads? We've brought together all our daffodil activities on this page so that children can enjoy them too! ""I wandered
